summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gaurav Athode's portfolio website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functioning well with minor UI improvements needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Code2 social link data-testid 'hero-social-code2' not found (should be LeetCode link)
Toast success message not clearly visible after form submission
No skill progress bars or visual skill indicators detected

integration_issues.issue: Hamburger menu clicked but mobile menu panel may not open properly

passed_tests: GitHub stats API (/api/github/stats) - profile data loaded
Contact form submission (/api/contact) - data stored in MongoDB
Contact form validation - proper error handling
Hero section loading with typing animation
Navigation between sections (Home, About, Skills, Experience, Projects, Contact)
Mini projects section with GitHub API integration
GitHub section with profile stats and coding profiles
Resume download button with PDF link
Contact form inputs and backend integration
Social links in hero and contact sections
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 endpoints), Frontend: 85% (15/17 features working perfectly)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Fix Code2 social link data-testid in HeroSection, 2) Improve contact form success toast visibility, 3) Add visual skill progress indicators in SkillsSection, 4) Fix mobile hamburger menu functionality
